CustomField.description: Report field to identify team responsible for current stage.
CustomField.formula:
CASE( TEXT(leaseworks__Claim_Status__c),
"Open", "Lease Management", "Future Claim", "Lease Management", "Technical Review", "External Reviewer / Powerplant", "Operator Engagement", "With Operator", "Technical Head/CTO Review", "PFM / I&S", "Finance/Accounting Review", "Lease Management", "CTO Sign-off", "Approvers", "Approved", "LM / PFM / FA", "Finalised", "Lease Management",
"Unmapped" )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Report field to identify team responsible for current stage.
CustomField.label: Team Responsible
